description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image and defines two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs gcc -Wall -Wextra -Werror -I./includes -o ft_hexdump *.c, then stores the resulting ft_hexdump binary as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that executes ./ft_hexdump Makefile to verify the binary. No services, caches, or special triggers are required.
